body:
I am very interested in becoming a member. I have spent time at both Soraia and Feilia in the past, and they are incredibly meaningful to me they were actually the last places I visited before I left home, and I’ve been looking forward to visiting again since the day I left.
​Currently, I am in the United States completing my Master’s degree. I am planning to return in late June or July, at which point I would love to be a regular guest again.
​Because I am still finishing my studies abroad, it is currently impossible for me to visit in person (for example, every 15 days) until my return this summer.
​Is it possible to secure my membership now under these circumstances? I would love to have everything set so I can visit as soon as I am back.
​I look forward to your response.


​Best regards,
​Nihar

text.body:
I am very interested in becoming a member. I have spent time at both Soraia and Feilia in the past, and they are incredibly meaningful to me they were actually the last places I visited before I left home, and I’ve been looking forward to visiting again since the day I left.
​Currently, I am in the United States completing my Master’s degree. I am planning to return in late June or July, at which point I would love to be a regular guest again.
​Because I am still finishing my studies abroad, it is currently impossible for me to visit in person (for example, every 15 days) until my return this summer.
​Is it possible to secure my membership now under these circumstances? I would love to have everything set so I can visit as soon as I am back.
​I look forward to your response.


​Best regards,
​Nihar

body:
Dear Fielia Team,
Thank you for the warm invitation to join the Fielia Members Circle—I’m thrilled by the sound of cinema-inspired evenings, signature drinks, and European comfort dishes at such an iconic Mumbai spot.
I’m definitely interested and would love to confirm my membership. However, I’m currently out of India and won’t be back until the 25th. Could we schedule my first visit shortly after? Please let me know the next steps for my digital e-card.
Looking forward to experiencing Fielia soon!
Best regards,  
Gunj Bafna

text.body:
Dear Fielia Team,
Thank you for the warm invitation to join the Fielia Members Circle—I’m thrilled by the sound of cinema-inspired evenings, signature drinks, and European comfort dishes at such an iconic Mumbai spot.
I’m definitely interested and would love to confirm my membership. However, I’m currently out of India and won’t be back until the 25th. Could we schedule my first visit shortly after? Please let me know the next steps for my digital e-card.
Looking forward to experiencing Fielia soon!
Best regards,  
Gunj Bafna

body:
Hi,

I'm reaching out from The Red Pen, an education consultancy firm. We're planning to host a hi-tea event for around 100 parents of students in grades 9-11 and are looking for a suitable venue.

We're looking at the first week of August and would require the space for approximately 2 hours. Our budget for the venue and refreshments (tea, coffee, and snacks) is ₹75,000.

Would you be interested in discussing this further and seeing if your space fits our requirements?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Punita 
The Red Pen

text.body:

Would you be interested in discussing this further and seeing if your space fits our requirements?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
